image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: 洁净车间内部. must keep set elements: 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影.
image_prompt_shot: shot S002. camera intent: comic_panel_01. action beats: 展示运行设备、管道、警示标识; 镜头缓慢平移展示地面通道. narration intent: 旁白 explains "车间内存在运行设备、管道、气路、水路和电气装置。请不要靠近旋转部件、加热部件和压力管路。不要倚靠设备，不要触碰阀门、按钮、线缆和管道。行走时注意地面，防止滑倒、绊倒和碰撞。". shot positive notes: 洁净车间内部，运行中的机械设备，管道和阀门，黄色警示标识，地面有防滑通道标记，明亮冷光，工业安全氛围.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: 洁净车间内部. must keep set elements: 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影. shot S002. camera intent: comic_panel_01. action beats: 展示运行设备、管道、警示标识; 镜头缓慢平移展示地面通道. narration intent: 旁白 explains "车间内存在运行设备、管道、气路、水路和电气装置。请不要靠近旋转部件、加热部件和压力管路。不要倚靠设备，不要触碰阀门、按钮、线缆和管道。行走时注意地面，防止滑倒、绊倒和碰撞。". shot positive notes: 洁净车间内部，运行中的机械设备，管道和阀门，黄色警示标识，地面有防滑通道标记，明亮冷光，工业安全氛围.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱线缆, 溢出液体, 敞开门, 无标识区域, 人员遮挡，设备静止，光线昏暗, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 车间内存在运行设备、管道、气路、水路和电气装置。请不要靠近旋转部件、加热部件和压力管路。不要倚靠设备，不要触碰阀门、按钮、线缆和管道。行走时注意地面，防止滑倒、绊倒和碰撞。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
